creator: ivy@FreeBSD.org
text: i've named this 'postgres_exporter' after the pattern of existing ports like 'blackbox_exporter'.  i think something like 'prometheus-postgres-exporter' would be nicer, following the example of e.g. net-mgmt/prometheus-collectd-exporter, but i'm not sure if there's any policy about this or a strong reason to prefer one of the other.
